---
name: Install help
about: Ask for public install help without sharing secrets
title: "[Install] "
labels: install-help
assignees: ''
---

## Server OS

Example: Ubuntu 24.04 LTS

## Install command used

Paste the command with email, domain, IP, tokens, and private values removed.

## What happened

Describe the error or unexpected result.

## What you expected

Describe the expected install result.

## Safe logs

Paste only logs with secrets removed. Do not post root passwords, API keys, license keys, private SSH keys, database passwords, or customer data.
